Sources ACIP Recommendations: Diphtheria, Tetanus and Pertussis (DTaP/Tdap/Td) Vaccines | ACIP Recommendations | CDC 
Whooping Cough 
Pertussis, also known as whooping cough, can cause serious illness in people of all ages but is most dangerous for babies.
